eyebrow.zh: Windows 桌面 · UIA 无障碍树 · 开源 MIT
eyebrow.en: Windows desktop · UIA tree · open source MIT

headline.zh:
把 Windows UIA 树
变成 LLM 的行动空间
headline.en:
The Windows UIA tree,
as an LLM action space

sub.zh: 快照焦点窗口的 UIA 无障碍树并剪枝到 ≤400 节点，交给 LLM 要恰好一个结构化动作，再用真实 UIA 控件模式分发回正在运行的桌面软件。单进程，约 700 行 Python，无服务、无 daemon。
sub.en: Snapshots the focused window's UIA tree pruned to ≤400 nodes, asks the LLM for exactly one structured action, then dispatches it back through real UIA control patterns to the running desktop app. One process, ~700 lines of Python, no daemon.

hero.command: uia-agent run --app Notepad "type a haiku and save as poem.txt"

title.en: The UIA tree is the action space

body.zh: 把 Windows UIA 无障碍树当成 LLM agent 的一类 action space，和 DOM（browser-use）、像素（VLM）、人写的 selector（UiPath）并列。每步快照并剪枝到 ≤400 节点 / ≤12 层深，丢掉离屏和无名噪声叶子，给每个节点算一个跨快照稳定的 hash id。
body.en: Treats the Windows UIA accessibility tree as a first-class LLM action space — alongside DOM (browser-use), pixels (VLM), or hand-written selectors (UiPath). Each step snapshots and prunes the tree to ≤400 nodes / ≤12 deep, drops off-screen and unnamed noise leaves, and hashes a stable id per node across snapshots.

chips: › 剪枝到 ≤400 节点 / ≤12 层

title.zh: 7 种动作走真实 UIA pattern
title.en: 7 typed actions on real UIA patterns

body.zh: click / type / select / expand / key / wait / done 七种有类型的动作，全部走真实 UIA 控件模式：Invoke、Value、SelectionItem、ExpandCollapse。LLM 用结构化输出（Anthropic tool-use 或 OpenAI JSON-schema），所以动作解析不会软失败。
body.en: Seven typed actions — click / type / select / expand / key / wait / done — all dispatched through real UIA control patterns: Invoke, Value, SelectionItem, ExpandCollapse. The LLM uses structured output (Anthropic tool-use or OpenAI JSON-schema), so action parsing can't fail soft.

title.en: MCP server: desktop apps over MCP

body.zh: v0.3 新增：把同一套 uia_dump + uia_run 暴露成 MCP，任意 MCP 客户端（Claude Desktop 等）直接驱动 Windows 桌面软件，不用 LangChain 胶水。mcp SDK 懒加载，核心包保持零依赖，是可选 [mcp] extra。
body.en: New in v0.3: exposes the same uia_dump + uia_run over MCP, so any MCP client (Claude Desktop, etc.) drives a Windows app directly — no LangChain glue. The mcp SDK is imported lazily, the core stays dependency-free, and it's an optional [mcp] extra.

chips: › [mcp] 可选 extra · 零依赖核心

title.zh: 视觉兜底 · 诚实 hit-rate

body.zh: 老软件自己画控件、UIA 树里一个可点节点都没有时，加 --vision：截屏 + OCR，按坐标点击置信度最高的文字区域，而不是直接放弃。v0.3 修了重复点同一坐标耗尽步数预算的 spin bug。BENCHMARK.md 按 (app × LLM × 版本) 给 hit-rate，跌破 40% 我们自己宣布 kill。
body.en: When a legacy app paints its own controls and the UIA tree has zero clickable nodes, add --vision: it screenshots, runs OCR, and clicks the highest-confidence text region by coordinate instead of giving up. v0.3 fixes the spin bug that re-clicked one coordinate until the step budget was exhausted. BENCHMARK.md publishes hit-rate by (app × LLM × version); below 40% we kill the project ourselves.

sub.zh: 开源、MIT、自带 API key，没有云端 runner、没有 telemetry、没有付费墙。
sub.en: Open source, MIT, bring your own API key. No cloud runner, no telemetry, no paywall.

tag.zh: 用 UIA 无障碍树驱动 Windows 老古董桌面软件的开源 LLM agent
tag.en: The open-source LLM agent that drives legacy Windows desktop apps via the UIA tree
